descriptionShort: University of Maine defenseman Stan Czenczek explains his college recruitment decision over University of Denver.
descriptionLong: University of Maine-Orono freshman defenseman Stan Czenczek from Surrey, British Columbia, recounts his recruitment process in which he nearly committed to the University of Denver but ultimately chose Maine. Czenczek credits Maine Coach Shawn Walsh's persistence and genuine interest in his development as factors in his decision. Denver Coach Ralph Backstrom acknowledged Maine's successful recruitment, noting he had matched Maine's scholarship offer.
